summary: Validated Landing Hero Image enhancement end-to-end on public preview URL (backend + frontend) without uploading a file; confirmed admin URL/upload controls, public-config propagation, dynamic landing update, and default fallback restoration.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py and frontend/src/App.js remain very large and multi-responsibility; split into smaller modules to reduce regression risk and simplify future settings/branding enhancements.

Potential precedence risk: when both landing_hero_image_url and landing_hero_image_asset are populated, /api/public/config prefers URL. If product intent is to prioritize newly uploaded file, backend should clear URL on upload or define explicit precedence rules.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Temporary landing_hero_image_url change was restored to original empty value during test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL public endpoint. Added backend regression file focused on landing hero settings/public config sync. UI run verified admin settings exposes both controls, URL-based hero updates render immediately on landing page, and fallback default dog image is active again after restoring empty URL. No file upload was performed by design.
rca of the issue: No functional defect reproduced for requested enhancement scope. Dynamic behavior and fallback worked as expected.
